summary: DirectDine iter13 tested — 14/14 backend PASS (test_directdine_iter13.py, 4.68s) and frontend owner UI verified. BACKEND: (1) PUT /api/restaurants/me with {lat:41.05, lng:29.02, address:'Kadikoy Test', delivery_radius_km:5, min_order_value:0, hours:all-open} → 200 with those exact values echoed; GET /api/restaurants/me/info re-reads lat=41.05, lng=29.02, address='Kadikoy Test' (persisted). Bella Napoli restored to lat=41.0369/lng=28.985/address='Istiklal Cad. No:1, Beyoglu, Istanbul' at test module teardown. (2) Courier broadcast: created an active order (Bella Napoli) assigned to courier1, POST /api/couriers/me/location → 200 with {ok:true, lat:41.041, lng:28.993}; GET /api/couriers/{cid}/location confirms persistence. The new owner_by_rest lookup path does NOT crash — active_orders find + restaurants find + ws_manager.send(owner_id) all execute cleanly (verified by 200 response). (3) Also passed the no-active-orders control (still returns ok/lat/lng). (4) Full regression PASS: campaign start/stop for days=[1,3,7,14,30] (5 params), min_order_value=500 → 400 'minimum order', delivery_radius_km=0 → 422, all-days-closed → 400 'closed', item availability=false → 400 'unavailable', review-before-delivered → 400 'delivered'. FRONTEND (desktop 1280x800, owner1 login → /dashboard): (a) OwnerSidebar renders LinearGradient brand card with 'EasYum / Restaurant Admin' at top ✅ and the 5-item nav (Orders/Menu/Couriers/Profile + Logout at bottom). (b) Profile → Restaurant settings → modal opens; ALL required testIDs found: open-restaurant-settings, restaurant-location-picker, restaurant-radius-input, save-restaurant-settings; 'RESTAURANT LOCATION' section label present, Google Maps iframe (title='map') visible with 'Map data ©2026' → LocationPicker.web.tsx correctly resolved on web. Delivery radius input (5), Min order (0), Weekly hours (Mon-Sun toggles + 00:00–23:59) and campaign chips (1d/3d/7d/14d/30d) all visible below the map — layout order matches spec. (c) Save flow: clicked save-restaurant-settings → modal closed successfully. (d) Orders tab: owner-track-courier-<id> pill correctly NOT rendered when no courierLocs are in state (defensive render at dashboard.tsx:252-261 with && guard); testID selector shape and conditional logic verified by code review — pill will appear as green live-dot Pressable next to the courier name once a 'courier_location' WS event arrives for that order, and tapping calls openLocation(lat,lng,label). All backend infrastructure supporting that WS event is verified working in the pytest above. Design polish confirmed: order cards render subtle shadow (the box-shadow CSS deprecation warnings in console are RN Web informational only). Deprecated packages check: none of expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch present in package.json — clean.
action_items: (Non-blocking) console shows 'shadow* style props deprecated. Use boxShadow' — RN 0.75+ web deprecation. Consider migrating shadow* → boxShadow in styles when convenient.
(Non-blocking) 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — LocationPicker.tsx:110 uses <View pointerEvents="none">. Migrate to style={{pointerEvents:'none'}}.
(Carry-over) server.py is ~1564 lines — still recommend splitting into routers/modules.
(Carry-over from iter12) Consider adding a Playwright-friendly wrapper Pressable around each Switch on menu availability toggles.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py:806-837 POST /couriers/me/location — correctly uses two separate finds (orders → distinct restaurant_ids → owners) and a dict lookup owner_by_rest; ws_manager.send to both customer_id and owner_id. Only queries owners collection when active_orders exist (short-circuit). Good.

backend/server.py:574-586 PUT /restaurants/me — uses dict-comprehension `{k:v for k,v in ... if v is not None}` so partial payloads (only lat/lng, only hours, etc.) don't wipe out other fields. lat/lng/address flow through untouched.

frontend/app/(customer)/profile.tsx:329-338 Restaurant Settings modal has clean section header 'RESTAURANT LOCATION' + LocationPicker in a 260px fixed-height container + help hint text before the delivery-radius input. Order matches spec.

frontend/src/components/LocationPicker.web.tsx:65-108 Uses Google Maps embed iframe (no API key required) + geolocation API for detect. commit() called via 'Set' button and via address text change. onChange properly bubbles lat/lng/address to parent so the modal's save handler can PUT correctly.
frontend/src/components/LocationPicker.tsx:94-108 Native uses react-native-maps with draggable marker + center-pin overlay for pan-and-drop UX. Good UX.

frontend/app/(owner)/dashboard.tsx:252-261 Track-courier pill is behind (courierLocs[item.id] && !['delivered','cancelled'].includes(item.status)) — correct defensive render. testID pattern `owner-track-courier-${item.id}` matches spec.
frontend/src/components/OwnerSidebar.tsx uses LinearGradient brand card as described — verified visually in screenshot (green gradient card with EasYum / Restaurant Admin).

success_rate.frontend: 100% for verified owner UI paths (sidebar gradient card + RESTAURANT LOCATION section + map iframe + save-flow-closes-modal + owner-track-courier defensive render)

seed_data_creation: During iter13 backend tests: (a) One TEST_iter13_loc order was created on Bella Napoli then walked to 'accepted' and 'cancelled' after the location POST — no lingering active state. (b) One TEST_review_iter13 order created then 'cancelled' as part of the review-gate regression. (c) Bella Napoli lat/lng/address/hours/radius/min-order were briefly mutated to Kadikoy Test / all-open / 5 / 0 and RESTORED at module teardown via autouse fixture to defaults (lat=41.0369, lng=28.985, address='Istiklal Cad. No:1, Beyoglu, Istanbul', radius=5, min_order=0, hours=all-days-open). No cleanup required by main agent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter13 additions verified: (1) LocationPicker.web.tsx (Google Maps iframe embed + geolocation detect + Set button) and LocationPicker.tsx (react-native-maps draggable marker) — both surface via profile.tsx testID='restaurant-location-picker' inside the open-restaurant-settings modal. (2) Backend POST /couriers/me/location now broadcasts 'courier_location' to (a) customer_id for each active order AND (b) owner_id via owner_by_rest lookup — verified non-crash with pytest. Response shape still {ok:true, lat, lng}. (3) Owner dashboard renders `owner-track-courier-${item.id}` pill only when courierLocs[item.id] is set AND status not in [delivered, cancelled]. To E2E-test the pill visually you must open two sessions (owner web + courier) and POST /couriers/me/location while the owner has an active-assigned order — the WS event will populate courierLocs[]. Bella Napoli was RESTORED to defaults at teardown. All 14 iter13 tests + all iter12 regression tests are still green.
